wait("1")
print("shitty ass ue got cracked with its shitty ass obfuscator")

function U(U)return O[U+(-125498-(-158776))]end for U,f in ipairs({{-841722-(-841723);609237+-608983};{-94715-(-94716);-138262+138317},{-738517-(-738573),613975+-613721}})do while
